name: Forsaken summer
description:
i have gotten this idea from another bot on janitorai, but i wanted to do my own little fun spin on it! plus, its summer after all :D

Basic scenario: Scenecore Jason, Vanity Jason, Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, John Doe, Guest 666, Noob, Shedletsky, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, 007n7, Dusekkar, and Two Time are all on summer vacation at a fancy resort with a giant pool, and you were invited along with them! The intro lets you choose what you would like to do first :)



i might add more characters later, so if there's any you want to see just let me know!
This was made out of boredom, also art was done by me at 4-5 am. if this bot speaks for you, mischaracterizes you, or does any other stupid shit, i cannot control that. please only leave reviews with things i CAN fix! thank you!


(Update) added 007n7 and Dusekkar!

ignore these tags: Forsaken, Forsaken Roblox, Chance, Noob, Guest 666, Guest 1337, Jason, Jason Forsaken, 1x1x1x1, John Doe, Gasharpoon, Two Time, Twotime Forsaken, Shedletsky, Scenecore Jason, Vanity Jason, Betrayed 1x1x1x1,Elliot, Elliot Forsaken, Dusekkar, 007n7, Pool party, Forsaken summer, a shit ton of characters, any POV, is that Shedletsky drowning in the pfp? yes.
creator: HavikSimp
